capture_plan.customer_profile: Army Sustainment Command (ASC) requires integrated logistics support for TACOM maintenance operations. Key decision makers value mission reliability, process maturity, and demonstrated sustainment experience. Hot buttons: zero-defect maintenance, rapid deployment capability, and cost-predictable pricing.
capture_plan.requirements_summary: Full lifecycle logistics support including supply chain management, maintenance planning, technical data management, and field service engineering. Requires SECRET clearance for key personnel. Performance period: 5 years (1 base + 4 options).
capture_plan.solution_strategy: Leverage existing RS3 infrastructure and CASCOM relationships to provide turnkey logistics support. Differentiate through CMMI ML3 process maturity and ISO 9001 quality management. Propose hybrid workforce model combining cleared Envision personnel with local technical experts.

evidence: RS3 contract performance: 99.2% uptime across 3 task orders
8 years continuous Army Sustainment Command support
win_themes.customer_hot_button: Continuity of service and institutional knowledge

ghost_themes.rationale: Incumbent lacks OASIS+ access — Envision offers multi-vehicle flexibility reducing contract risk for the government

discriminators: Active RS3 prime with proven Army task order execution
DCAA-approved accounting system for audit readiness
OASIS+ Pool 1 and 3 access for follow-on flexibility
capture_plan.pricing_strategy: Competitive fixed-price with cost-plus option years. Labor rates benchmarked against RS3 actuals. No opportunistic pricing per Doctrine §Pricing. Include 5% management reserve for transition risk.

partners.name: Riverstone Solutions
partners.contribution: HUBZone set-aside value-add and classified DevSecOps capability

teaming_plan.rationale: Riverstone's HUBZone certification strengthens SDB positioning and their classified DevSecOps capability fills C5ISR gap in Envision's direct workforce

pink_hat_gaps.gap: Missing direct TACOM PEO C3T past performance narratives
pink_hat_gaps.recommended_fix: Draft PP narrative from adjacent ASC work emphasizing transferable logistics skills
Develop 90-day transition plan with named key personnel and knowledge transfer milestones

red_team_weaknesses.weakness: CMMI-DEV ML3 certification expiring 8/7/2026 during performance period
red_team_weaknesses.mitigation: Initiate CMMI renewal process immediately; include renewal timeline in proposal

red_team_weaknesses.weakness: Limited cleared workforce for immediate deployment
red_team_weaknesses.mitigation: Pre-identify 5 cleared personnel from existing Army contracts for transition team

black_hat_competitor_positioning.likely_approach: Emphasize continuity of service, existing cleared workforce, and minimal transition risk
black_hat_competitor_positioning.counter_strategy: Position Envision's process maturity (CMMI ML3) as risk reducer; highlight multi-vehicle flexibility via OASIS+

next_action.action: Develop 90-day transition plan with named key personnel

source_chips.label: FPDS Award History — Army ASC Logistics
